mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_leaderboard_data (game_id, user_id, username, nickname, avatar_url, dimension_code, dimension_value, decimal_value, rank_type, rank_date, rank_month, rank_year, extra_data, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{gameId}, #{userId}, #{username}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{dimensionCode}, #{dimensionValue}, #{decimalValue}, #{rankType}, #{rankDate}, #{rankMonth}, #{rankYear}, #{extraData}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE dimension_value = GREATEST(dimension_value, VALUES(dimension_value)), decimal_value = GREATEST(COALESCE(decimal_value, 0), VALUES(decimal_value)), update_time = VALUES(update_time)

INSERT INTO t_leaderboard_data (game_id, user_id, username, nickname, avatar_url, dimension_code, dimension_value, decimal_value, rank_type, rank_date, rank_month, rank_year, extra_data, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{gameId}, #{userId}, #{username}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{dimensionCode}, #{dimensionValue}, #{decimalValue}, #{rankType}, #{rankDate}, #{rankMonth}, #{rankYear}, #{extraData}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE dimension_value = LEAST(dimension_value, VALUES(dimension_value)), decimal_value = LEAST(COALESCE(decimal_value, 999999), VALUES(decimal_value)), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
